name: agent-org
description: AI organizational engineering toolkit. Phase 4 までで context-compressor / decision-keeper / architect-reviewer / regression-watcher / regression-fixer subagent、/compress-context / /org-init / /run-review / /start-watcher / /fix-regression command、consulting-memory / recording-decision / running-review skill、PostCompact / Stop / TaskCompleted / PostToolUse(Bash) hooks を提供。worktree 隔離下では fixer が git remote 経由 (push + gh pr) で main に統合する設計。v0.6.0: beads (Phase 5) hard dependency — detection/fix を `~/.beads/<proj-hash>/.beads/` (Steve Yegge beads) に格納、`bd update --claim` で atomic claim、`bd dep add` で依存グラフ。bd 未 install / `.beads/` 未初期化なら subagent は immediate error で abort。v1.0.0 で機能セット凍結予定
